name: AMICUS CURIAE, INC.
filter_reason: Legal services/software for law firms. Name is Latin legal term. Not a modern scalable tech startup. Incorporated 1989.

name: MONTEREY TECHNOLOGY GROUP INC
filter_reason: IT consulting/staffing firm, not a product-based tech startup.

name: RENOVOPAY LLC
description: RenovoPay provides SaaS payment processing and loan management software for utilities, municipalities, and financial institutions. Automates billing, online payments, and loan origination workflows. Established niche fintech serving government and utility sectors.

name: BRANCH & CO LLC
filter_reason: Website listed is branch.io — a large CA-based deep linking startup — but this CO entity is almost certainly a different company. Data mismatch; no verifiable tech product for this CO entity.

name: POPULAR LAB CO
description: Hugo (withhugo.com) is an HR and team scheduling platform for hourly workforce management. Provides shift scheduling, time tracking, team coordination tools for small to mid-sized businesses. Early-stage California startup.

name: 4CLICKS-SOLUTIONS LLC
description: 4Clicks for Federal (now part of Gordian) is specialized construction cost estimating and project management software for US federal government and military. Used in thousands of IDIQ/JOC/SABER contracts. Integrates RSMeans data and populates government forms. Acquired by Gordian.

name: SLINGWAVE, INC.
description: Slingwave is an AI-powered marketing analytics, attribution, and media optimization platform for eCommerce, D2C, and CPG brands. Products include MMM+ (Media Mix Modeling), VELOCITY AMA (Agile Marketing Attribution), and SAGE Experimentation Suite. Founded 2017, profitable bootstrapped startup serving leading D2C brands.

name: READYSET SURGICAL LLC
description: ReadySet Surgical provides a cloud-based SaaS platform for hospital and ASC surgical supply chain management. Automates loaner tray tracking, vendor coordination, billing automation, and analytics. Used by 50+ leading health systems. SOC 2 Type II certified. Received investment from Riverside Acceleration Capital (RAC) in August 2025.

name: DISBELIEF LLC
filter_reason: Game development contract studio (not a SaaS/product company). Works on AAA titles like Borderlands 4, Gears of War. Former BioShock Infinite engineers. A services business, not a scalable software product.

name: SRI INFOTECH INC.
filter_reason: IT staffing, consulting, and management services firm. Not a product-based tech startup.

name: ARENA
description: Arena Solutions provides cloud-based Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) and Quality Management System (QMS) software for hardware and electronics manufacturers. Strong in medical devices and electronics sectors. Acquired by PTC in 2021; continues to operate as Arena brand within PTC.

name: AMERICAN TRAINING CENTER INC.
filter_reason: Ferrara's Beauty School — vocational beauty and cosmetology school. Not a tech company.

name: ASCII GROUP INC
filter_reason: ASCII Group is an IT membership organization and MSP community, not a software product startup.

name: SHOOTPROOF, LLC
description: ShootProof is a SaaS platform for professional photographers providing online client galleries, photo proofing, contracts, invoicing, and print lab integrations. Commission-free sales model. 10,000+ photographers in 38 countries, 18 languages. Strategic PE investment from Providence Strategic Growth (PSG) in December 2018.

name: AQ2 TECHNOLOGY LLC
description: AQ2 Technologies (now part of Embrace Software) provides transaction automation software (AQURIT) for check payment processing, remittance, and remote deposit capture. Serves 350+ clients in banking, utilities, and government. Acquired by Embrace Software in March 2021.

name: E RING INC
description: E-Ring provides web-based CAMA (Computer Assisted Mass Appraisal), CRM, and property tax administration software for local government agencies. Products include Capture Platform (AI-infused CAMA), Collections system, and Capture Connect (case management/GIS/permits). Serves county assessors and local governments across the US.

name: EXPO INC., COLORADO AUTHORITY RELINQUISHED MAY 8, 2023
filter_reason: Colorado authority relinquished May 2023 — company may be defunct or restructured. Operational status unclear. Not suitable for outreach.

name: TANDA INC
description: Tanda is an Australian-founded cloud SaaS platform for workforce management, time & attendance, employee scheduling, payroll integration, and compliance for hourly workers. US entity in Chicago (20 W Kinzie St). Serves retail, hospitality, manufacturing, and healthcare industries globally. Independent Australian company (Brisbane HQ), founded 2012.

name: INTUITES LLC
filter_reason: Accounting and bookkeeping firm. Not a tech startup.

name: KOGNITOS INC
description: Kognitos is a neurosymbolic AI platform that automates enterprise business processes using plain English natural language — no code required. Founded by ThoughtSpot alumni. Series B June 2025 ($25M) led by Prosperity7 Ventures with Khosla Ventures. Wipro partnership for GenAI-based automation. Total funding: $51.2M. Customers include Fortune 500 companies.

name: REPLICA INC
description: Replica is an urban planning data platform using de-identified mobile location data to help public agencies, transportation departments, and private companies understand movement patterns. Spun out of Alphabet/Sidewalk Labs in 2019. Customers include Caltrans, TexasDOT, MTA, Waymo, Deloitte, AECOM. Offices in Kansas City, NYC, SF.

name: AUGMENTED INTELLIGENCE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
description: Augintel provides NLP-powered SaaS for health and social services agencies to extract actionable insights from unstructured case notes. Used by 6,000+ staff at Illinois DCFS. AWS Government Competency Partner. Available on AWS Marketplace. Selected for AWS Health Equity Initiative ($40M commitment, Nov 2022). Featured in House Ways and Means Committee testimony.

name: TWOWAY SECURITY INC
filter_reason: TrustPage (formerly TwoWay Security) was a security compliance trust center startup acquired by Vanta in January 2023. No longer operating independently.

name: CORITY SOFTWARE USA INC.
description: Cority is a global leader in EHS+ (Environmental, Health, Safety, Quality, Sustainability) SaaS software. 1,500+ enterprise customers worldwide including Fortune 500 manufacturers, chemicals, healthcare, and oil & gas. First EHS platform with FedRAMP authorization. 13 AI agents in 2026 product suite. IL entity is US subsidiary of Canadian-HQ company.

name: DUMPLING INC
description: Dumpling is a gig economy SaaS platform ($29/mo) enabling personal shoppers to build their own local grocery delivery businesses. Commission-free — shoppers keep 100% of earnings and tips. Average shopper earns $32/order. Co-founded by Joel Shapiro (ex-National Instruments) and Nate D'Anna (ex-Cisco). Total funding $10M (Forerunner Ventures, Floodgate, FUEL Capital).
